title: indulgent mediterranean cheese lasagna
description: a rich and satisfying lasagna featuring the flavors of the mediterranean, with a crunchy apple topping
instructions: cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions and set aside
in a medium bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, feta cheese, parmesan cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper
in a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the garlic until softened
add the cooked lasagna noodles to the skillet and toss with the garlic and olive oil
in a separate bowl, combine the applesauce and lemon juice and mix well
spread a layer of the ricotta cheese mixture on the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish
arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese mixture
spread half of the applesauce mixture over the noodles
sprinkle with half of the parmesan cheese
repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the ricotta cheese mixture, then the applesauce mixture, and finally the parmesan cheese
cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes
remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes
remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving
